sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116239" key="w)moxeirou/rghtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠμο-χειρούργητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n116239.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">premature,</tr_> of a surgical operation, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὠ. ποιῆσαι τὴν χειρουργίαν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:1:180d" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.180d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
